AMALGAMATOR.pages.INITIAL.options.INJECT: Remove 2 [gold]Strike[/gold] cards. Then enchant an Attack card with [purple]Ultimate Strike[/purple].
Remove 2 [gold]Defend[/gold] cards. Then enchant a Skill card with Block with [purple]Ultimate Defend[/purple].
AMALGAMATOR.pages.INJECT_STRIKES.descrip: The Amalgamator condenses strike essence into a single card core, forcing your attack circuit to spike.
AMALGAMATOR.pages.INJECT_DEFENDS.descrip: The Amalgamator welds defensive modules into the card's weave, making each block pulse unnaturally steady.
ME_SETTINGS.page.title: MoreEnchant
ME_SETTINGS.section.general.title: Enchantment Settings
ME_SETTINGS.section.general.description: Uses native RitsuLib controls. Multiplayer clients are read-only and follow host settings.
ME_SETTINGS.shop_enchant_enabled.label: Shop Enchant Toggle
ME_SETTINGS.shop_enchant_enabled.descrip: Controls whether newly offered shop cards can roll random enchantments.
ME_SETTINGS.shop_enchant_chance.label: Shop Enchant Chance
ME_SETTINGS.ancient_reward_enchant_enabl: Controls whether ancient reward enchantment is enabled.
ME_SETTINGS.reward_enchant_chance.label: Reward Enchant Chance
ME_SETTINGS.combat_generated_enchant_ena: Controls whether cards generated during combat can roll random enchantments.
ME_SETTINGS.transform_enchant_enabled.de: Controls whether transformed cards can roll random enchantments.
Controls whether cards directly added to deck can roll random enchantments.
ME_SETTINGS.starting_deck_enchant_enable: Controls whether starting deck cards can roll random enchantments.
ME_SETTINGS.beta_reward_enchantments_ena: When enabled, reward pools can include beta enchantments.
ME_SETTINGS.use_chimera_rarity_by_card_r: Use Chimera Weight by Card Rarity
When enabled, preset weights follow card rarity; when disabled, use custom weights below.
ME_SETTINGS.weight_common.label: Common Weight
ME_SETTINGS.weight_common.description: Relative weight for common bucket in custom mode (0-2000).
ME_SETTINGS.weight_uncommon.label: Uncommon Weight
ME_SETTINGS.weight_uncommon.description: Relative weight for uncommon bucket in custom mode (0-2000).
ME_SETTINGS.weight_curse.label: Curse Weight
ME_SETTINGS.weight_curse.description: Relative weight for curse bucket in custom mode (0-2000).
ME_SETTINGS.weight_rare.label: Rare Weight
ME_SETTINGS.weight_rare.description: Relative weight for rare bucket in custom mode (0-2000).
ME_SETTINGS.weight_special.label: Special Weight
ME_SETTINGS.weight_special.description: Relative weight for special bucket in custom mode (0-2000).
ME_SETTINGS.section.pool_filter.title: Allow Only These Enchantments
ME_SETTINGS.section.pool_filter.descript: Enter enchantment IDs / English / Chinese titles (comma or newline separated). Leave empty for no restriction; when non-empty, only matches remain in the random pool.
ME_SETTINGS.reward_enchant_only_filter.d: Example: SCORCHING_ENCHANTMENT or Scorching. Unmatched names are ignored.
ME_SETTINGS.section.blacklist.title: Enchantment Blacklist
ME_SETTINGS.section.blacklist.descriptio: Turn a switch off to keep that enchantment out of the random pool (all on by default).
